data.name: Sex Game - Gay Affair - Episode 2
data.detailed_description:
A simple SEX SIMULATION game with VISUAL NOVEL elements, featuring HD GRAPHICS and juicy ANIMATIONS.

Dominic and Ben, a passionate gay couple, explore their deepest desires across a variety of intimate and public settings.
In this episode, they spend a warm summer evening in a luxurious beach house.

Experiment with different sex positions and styles to bring them to climax, while watching out for your stamina.

Your choices shape the experience.


Control the sex between the two of them.
Follow the 2 sliders and keep the sex going by pressing SPACE or CLICKING THE MOUSE at the right time, to avoid the arousal level to drop or your stamina to run out, and lose the game.
Go through various sex styles and positions, to avoid the arousal level to stop increasing.
All this, in high quality, realistic animations and renderings.

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and renderings.
- HD renders and animations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300 2.8 GHz/AMD
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any linux flavor
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300 2.8 GHz/AMD
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
